description_long: This town hall is a rectangular, two-story building with a central open courtyard, surrounded by red-tiled sloped roofs and beige stucco walls. The front facade features a prominent portico with four columns supporting a covered entryway, flanked by symmetrical wings with small windows and decorative red accents. The courtyard is landscaped with a stone path, a circular fountain or planter at the center, and several conical evergreen trees lining the walkway. The rear of the building has a large arched wooden door, while the side facades are more austere, with minimal windows and decorative elements. The structure sits on a stone foundation, and the overall design suggests a blend of Mediterranean and classical influences. The building's layout and features indicate it is intended for civic or administrative use, with a formal and welcoming appearance.
description: A two-story Mediterranean-style town hall with a central courtyard, red-tiled roofs, and a columned portico entrance. The building features decorative accents, a stone foundation, and landscaped courtyard with trees and a central fountain.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main portico entrance with four columns, symmetrical wings, and decorative window accents.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the long, windowless wall, tiled roof, and the row of courtyard trees visible above the wall.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the large arched wooden door, central courtyard with fountain, and symmetrical roofed wings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the other long wall and courtyard trees, with a corner tower visible.
attribute_facade_ornamentation: Columns at the entrance portico, red window accents, decorative cornices, and a stone foundation
attribute_entrance_design: Main entrance features a portico with four columns, a set of steps, and a double wooden door framed by decorative elements
